name: Hunter's Stew Dish for Royalty
recipeInstructions:
Squeeze the juice from sauerkraut or drain canned sauerkraut. In a large casserole dish combine sauerkraut, mushrooms, apple, tomatoes, peppercorns, bay leaf and 1/4 cup water. Cover and simmer for 75 minutes. Add sausage, meat and bacon. Continue simmering for another hour. Serve with steamed potatoes.
Steamed Potatoes:
Boil peeled potatoes in salted water until tender. Drain the potatoes, add butter and chopped dill. Let stand covered for 5 minutes before serving.
